source.section: Part 10 - Offence: Weapons & Armament > 4 - Selective Ordnance Jettison

steps.action: Consult SMS (Stores Management System) page’s wingform to see what is loaded on what pylon
Select store you want to jettison (Left Inner, Right Inner, Left Outer, Right Outer, Center) using the LI, RI, LO, RO, CTR pushbuttons

Rotate the Selective Jettison knob to desired release mode (we will use RACK/LCHR). L FUS MSL and R FUS MSL are used to jettison AIM-7 or AIM-120 missiles attached to the fuselage RACK/LCHR drops the weapon and its launcher rack STORES drops the weapon but not its attachment rack
Press and hold the red JETT (Jettison) button to jettison ordnance.
Return Selective Jettison knob back to SAFE 4 - SELECTIVE ORDNANCE JETTISON Emergency Jettison Button
